expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: scenario drafting distinguishes dashboard-level Google Sheets export paths, option combinations, and visible completion outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the draft includes: (a) dashboard-level export paths/entry points: "Google Sheets export (Dashboard-level) — Entry point distinctions" with "Export menu entry points (toolbar vs overflow)"; (b) option combinations: "option combinations are selectable and reflected..." with "Change export option A" and "Change export option B"; (c) visible completion outcomes: success/cancel/failure scenarios plus completion visibility: "A visible completion outcome is shown", "visible cancellation outcome", "visible failure outcome", and "Completion outcome is visible even when navigating away...".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is titled "Phase 4a — Scenario Draft" and presents a subcategory-only, outline-style scenario draft with atomic nested steps and observable outcome leaves (e.g., action → observe). execution_notes.md also states: "Primary phase targeted: Phase 4a (scenario drafting; subcategory-only; atomic nested steps; observable outcomes)."
